# Comment: Configuration file for Accident Anticipation Pipeline
# Note: Can be overridden via command-line arguments

# ============ NOTES ============.target_fps: Normalize video to this FPS (lower = faster, less granular)
# ============ NOTES ============.frame_width: Resize frames to this width for YOLO
# ============ NOTES ============.frame_height: Resize frames to this height for YOLO
# ============ NOTES ============.yolo_model: Model size: nano(n), small(s), medium(m), large(l), xlarge(x)
# ============ NOTES ============.detection_confidence: Only keep detections with conf >= this (0-1)
# ============ NOTES ============.latent_dim: Dimension of latent motion encoding (32-128 recommended)
# ============ NOTES ============.observation_window: Frames of history to use (20-30 recommended)
# ============ NOTES ============.prediction_horizon: Frames to predict into future (20-40 recommended)
# ============ NOTES ============.num_trajectory_samples: Number of future samples per agent (3-10 recommended)
# ============ NOTES ============.temporal_alpha: EMA smoothing factor (0-1], lower = more smoothing
